seoTitle: Newbury vs Newfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Newbury and Newfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Newbury and Newfield.
heading: Newbury vs Newfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Newbury, Victoria and Newfield, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Newbury and Newfield have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Newbury or Newfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Newbury has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Newfield scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Newbury scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Newfield scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Newbury or Newfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Newbury has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
